lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu gubaar hai gur bin giaan na hoee |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is darkness; without the Guru, there is no wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere guramat karanee saar |
lines.english: O my mind, under Guru's Instruction, do good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਲਗੇ ਤਿਨ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਰਜ ਵਿਗੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabad lage tin bujhiaa doojai paraj vigoee |1|
lines.english: Those who are attached to the Word of the Shabad understand; duality has ruined the people. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਾ ਕਾ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gunaa kaa nidhaan ek hai aape dee taa ko paae |
lines.english: The Lord alone is the treasure of virtue; He Himself gives, and then one receives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa har prabh raveh taa paaveh mokh duaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dwell forever and ever upon the Lord God, and you shall find the gate of salvation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਦੇ ਘਟਿ ਗਏ ਤਿਨਾ ਹਥਿ ਕਿਹੁ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree karade ghatt ge tinaa hath kihu na aaeaa |
lines.english: Acting in ego, they lose, and nothing comes into their hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਵਿਛੁੜੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh vichhurree gur kai sabad milaae |2|
lines.english: Without the Name, all are separated from the Lord; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one meets the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਏਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਜਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa ehu sareer hai antar jot jagaae |
lines.english: Hope and desire abide in this body, but the Lord's Light shines within as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satagur miliai sach mile sach naam samaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, they find Truth, and merge into the True Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਏ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukh bandh hai guramukh mukat karaae |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the self-willed manmukhs remain in bondage; the Gurmukhs are liberated. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee sadaa mukh ujalaa gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The faces of the happy soul-brides are radiant forever; through the Guru, they are peacefully poised.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa pir raaveh aapanaa vichahu aap gavaae |1|
lines.english: They enjoy their Husband Lord constantly, eradicating their ego from within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satagur mo kau har deea bujhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has led me to understand the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man too har har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਕਰੂਪੀ ਦੂਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਆਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae karoopee dookh paaveh aagai jaae |2|
lines.english: In the love of duality, they appear so ugly; they suffer in pain as they go to the world beyond. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਖਰੀਆ ਬਿਲਲਾਦੀਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dohaaganee khareea bilalaadeea tinaa mehal na paae |
lines.english: The abandoned brides cry out in their suffering; they do not attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣਵੰਤੀ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aauganavantee kaamanee dukh laagai bilalaae |3|
lines.english: The unvirtuous woman suffers, and cries out in pain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਨਿਤ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gunavantee nit gun ravai hiradai naam vasaae |
lines.english: The virtuous soul-bride constantly chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord; she enshrines the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within her heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਕ ਕੀਤਿਅਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਇਅਨੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aape vek keetian naame leian laae |4|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, He has separated some from Himself, while others are to His Name. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਭਤਾਰੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa bhataar ek hai suaamee kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |
lines.english: The One Lord and Master is the Husband Lord of all; His Praises cannot be expressed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਗਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam sad meetthaa laagaa gurasabadee saad aaeaa |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam is always sweet to me; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I come to taste it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee sehaj samaanee har jeeo man vasaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Through the True Word of the Guru's Bani, I am merged in peace and poise; the Dear Lord is enshrined in the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har kar kirapaa sataguroo milaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord, showing His Mercy, has caused me to meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਬੇਦ ਬਾਣੀ ਪਰਗਾਸੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਪਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: brahamai bed baanee paragaasee maaeaa moh pasaaraa |
lines.english: Through Brahma, the hymns of the Vedas were revealed, but the love of Maya spread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਸਤਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorai satagur har naam dhiaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Perfect True Guru, I meditate on the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਅਵਤਾਰੀ ਰੂਧਾ ਕਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kisan sadaa avataaree roodhaa kit lag tarai sansaaraa |
lines.english: Vishnu is always busy reincarnating himself - who will save the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾਦੇਉ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਵਰਤੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਤਾਮਸੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mahaadeo giaanee varatai ghar aapanai taamas bahut ahankaaraa |2|
lines.english: The wise one, Shiva, remains absorbed in himself, but he is engrossed in dark passions and excessive egotism. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sevaa te nisataaraa guramukh tarai sansaaraa |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, one is emancipated; the Gurmukh crosses over the world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਰਤੇ ਜੁਗ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚੂਕੈ ਮੋਹ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan rate jug antar chookai moh gubaaraa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are imbued with spiritual wisdom in this age; they are rid of the darkness of emotional attachment. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saachai naae rate bairaagee paaein mokh duaaraa |4|
lines.english: The detached renunciates are imbued with the True Name; they attain the gate of salvation. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: eko sach varatai sabh antar sabhanaa kare pratipaalaa |
lines.english: The One True Lord is pervading and permeating everywhere; He cherishes everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਕਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਦੀਵਾਨੁ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥੫॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak ikas bin mai avar na jaanaa sabhanaa deevaan deaalaa |5|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the One Lord, I do not know any other; He is the Merciful Master of all. ||5||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਤਤੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach sanjam tat giaan |
lines.english: The Gurmukh practices true self-discipline, and attains the essence of wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਲਗੈ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh saache lagai dhiaan |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the True Lord. ||1||
